metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.4-beta.5
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Makes the logical-library disclosure arrow directly clickable and persistent. - Adds shared logical-library Artwork for the list and metadata inspector. - Checks deep source roots and common Artwork/Images/Documentation folders. - Adds manual library-cover selection and image failure retry backoff.
